description: 11-a-side field lacrosse played on a 110x60 yard field across 4 12-minute quarters

periods.clock_stops: Last 2 minutes of each quarter on all dead balls

overtime.clock_rules: Continuous clock until timeout with 2 minutes remaining

substitutions.rules: Substitutions through the substitution area on the fly or during dead ball situations
specific_rules: Players must enter through the designated substitution area
Can substitute during live play or dead ball
No time limit on individual substitutions
Midfielders frequently rotate due to 4-minute line demands

faceoffs.occurs: Start of each quarter and after each goal
faceoffs.participants: FOGO or designated midfielder from each team
rules: One step back rule before ground ball is free
Non-faceoff players must stay 5 yards from X
Clamp violations result in possession to opposing team

personal_foul.description: Released when opposing team scores or time expires

technical_foul.description: Released when opposing team gains possession

expulsion_foul.description: Player ejected from game for serious infractions

crease.description: Area around goal where only goalie can be, violation results in goal cancellation

substitution_area.description: Area where players must enter and exit field

out_of_bounds.rule: Possession goes to nearest opposing player
out_of_bounds.exception: Attacking team caused it to go out - defending team possession

goal.description: Ball completely enters goal below goal line

scoring.winning: Team with most goals after 4 quarters wins

violations: Non-goalie in crease during live play
Goal cancelled if offensive player in crease when goal scored
Defensive player in crease is 1-yard foul
goalie_privileges: Only goalie can move freely in crease
Can throw ball out to clear
Protected from high elbows above shoulders

clears.definition: Moving ball from defensive end to midfield
clears.time_limit: 20 seconds to move ball past midfield line

stall_count.description: Keeps game moving at proper pace
stall_count.violation: Failure to shoot within stall count results in loss of possession

illegal_procedure: More than 3 long sticks on field at once

equipment.pocket_depth: Measured with ball sitting in pocket; cannot exceed certain depth
equipment.gloves: Must be high quality leather or synthetic with proper padding

regulation.timing: Can call during live play or dead ball

timeouts.usage: Strategic; often called before critical possessions or after opposition score

restraining_line.description: Line used for restarts and certain penalty situations
restraining_line.significance: Important for clearing violations and technical fouls
